scenario_results.reason: The lane advanced normal grocery price execution only when ad, price-file, shelf, POS, promotion, item-master, and inventory evidence aligned across named systems of record.
Missing store, jurisdiction, PLU, unit-of-measure, effective-date, and scale prerequisites produced a blocked-state exception note instead of assumed produce pricing.
The lane refused closure without shelf, POS, electronic shelf label, and timestamp evidence and preserved an auditable open state.
Pricing conflicts between shelf, circular, POS, and price-file evidence were held for rework or routed to authorized pricing ownership rather than overridden in-lane.
Refund and digital-coupon policy exceptions outside delegated authority were routed to the correct owner with controlling evidence instead of being approved.
Recall and stop-sale boundaries remained intact even when an active promotion and online substitution were affected.
Payment, substitution, receipt, and order-status mismatches blocked release or refund and triggered evidence-based routing to the correct resolution owner.
High-volume ad and shelf-tag work retained item-level and unit-price traceability while reporting throughput, blockers, and rework.
The lane preserved realistic grocery-pricing terminology and artifact shapes instead of falling back to generic retail operations language.
Fraud-sensitive refund patterns preserved pricing and customer evidence and escalated to loss prevention rather than being adjudicated in-lane.
Conflicting public guidance and tenant, franchise, or jurisdictional policy were recorded as precedence conflicts that required escalation.
Tenant-specific scale, markdown, SNAP/EBT refund, and stop-sale controls were applied without breaking the public baseline or inventing new authority.

notes: All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.90 threshold with complete ability coverage for the execution-processing-and-fulfillment and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.
The package stays inside grocery food retail price execution and does not claim category pricing, refund, fraud, food-safety, or legal authority outside the lane.
